entry.title: Logon Suffix Dissappears
entry.content:
Good Day,

Could you please assist? Launching of a custom SAPUI5 website with the language and client suffix(?sap-language=EN&sapclient=100).

The language & client suffix does appear upon initial login, but disappears once the website is reloaded(login is cached).

The system is currently on S/4HANA 2023

I have gone through the config, the profile parameters are set, sicf configurations and the language is installed.

Manually appending the suffix to the website is not a option.

entry.title: In fiori Navigation panel, selected filters are truncated and not visible
entry.content:
After selecting some data in the filters of the Navigation panel (standard fiori apps), we cannot see the values these are truncated 

 

The filter criteria set are all not directly visible completely: every entry seems truncated to show the "x" within the field. 
It is thus very annoying and especially time consuming (for all Fiori users) to verify if filters have been set correctly.
It would be very much appreciated if there is a possibility to enlarge these icons/tokens somehow

entry.title: SAP EHS WWI: change generated PDF filename from MATNR to customer code
entry.content:
We are working on an SAP EHS / WWI project related to Compliance and SDS generation.

We generate reports from transaction CG54 and use the option:

"Send to SAP spooler only for now"

The generated PDF finally appears in SAP Office with a filename following this standard pattern:

Material_<REPORT_CATEGORY>.PDF

Example:
123456_MSDS_EN.PDF

Our requirement is to replace the MATNR with a customer code / customer material number.

So far we have investigated the following:

  • WWI templates and symbols
  • Generation Variants (SRGV)
  • Report Shipping / MSDS_DIST
  • DDOC logs in SLG1
  • Programs RC1WWIDP and RC1WWIWP
  • Function module C1DA_REP_WORK_PROCESS
  • FM CVEA_RDOS_CREATE_BY_EHS

We also identified that the generated document is stored in DMS using:

C14S_DOCUMENT_ORIGINAL_PUT

and that the WWI server returns the filename in variable:

V_TRG_DOC1_NAME

through FM:

WWI_GENERATE_AND_IMPORT2

However, we are still unsure whether:

  1. The attachment filename is generated directly by the WWI server
  2. The filename is reconstructed later during DDOC / MSDS_DIST / SAPoffice processing
  3. There is any standard enhancement/BAdI/customizing specifically intended to control the attachment filename

Questions:

  • Has anyone changed the standard WWI/EHS attachment filename successfully?
  • Is there any standard BAdI, User Exit or Enhancement Spot for this?
  • Does SAP standard always generate filenames based on MATNR + Report Category + Language?
  • Is the SAPoffice attachment name taken from DMS original filename or rebuilt later during report shipping?

We are debugging standard programs/functions but we would like to avoid modifying SAP standard if a proper enhancement spot already exists.

Any hints about the correct enhancement point would be greatly appreciated.

Regards.

AG

entry.title: Adaptation Project development with flp sandbox 404 error
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

To enhance the standard Fiori App, we created the adaption project with VSCode.

Currently, we are facing flp sandbox 404 error during adaptation project development(Open Adaptation Editor & Preview Application).  Are any solutions for this error?

Background:

The back-end ABAP version is OP2023SP1.

Due to our internal internet is not able to reach 'https://ui5.sap.com',  we replaced it with 'http://< host name>:<service port>/sap/public/bc/ui5_ui5/' in ui5.yaml file to make sure the app could load those UI5 librarys such as sap-ui-core.js. By this way, we could preview the app with 'noflp' option but we face sanbox 404 error with the 'flp' option.

Unfortunately, it seems the adaptation project development(Both 'Open Adaptation Editor' and 'Preview Application') are using the 'flp' option only so that we could not avoid this error.

Thanks

Jon

entry.title: How we can pass parameters from UI5 application to HTML for gui app in fiori lauchpad?
entry.content:
Here is my custom application where sales order is generated with billing document number and parcel number. Those Billing document and parcel number i have to display in HTML for GUI app (Receipt Voucher) custom ABAP report in Fiori Launchpad. 

  Above billing document number and parcel number i have to pass to HTML for GUI app (Receipt Voucher)

Here is the js function i have written 

onReceiptBoucher: function() {
var sBillingDoc = 78454656565;
var sParcelNo = 5454626526;
 
if (!sBillingDoc || !sParcelNo) {
sap.m.MessageBox.error("Please generate billing document first.");
return;
}
 
var xmservice = sap.ushell && sap.ushell.Container &&
sap.ushell.Container.getService("CrossApplicationNavigation");
 
if (xmservice) {
var hash = xmservice.hrefForExternal({
target: {
semanticObject: "ZRV",
action: "display"
},
// Parameters perfectly match your configuration mapping
params: {
"BillingDoc": [String(sBillingDoc)],
"ParcelNum": [String(sParcelNo)],
"DYNP_OKCODE": ["=ONLI"] // Bypasses selection screen by clicking Execute
}
});
 
var url = window.location.href.split('#')[0] + hash;
sap.m.URLHelper.redirect(url, true);
} else {
sap.m.MessageToast.show("Fiori Launchpad services are unavailable.");
}
}

entry.title: Fiori Elements ALP (OData V2): Basic Search field shown despite @Search.searchable: false in CDS
entry.content:
Problem:

In an Analytical List Page (ALP) application based on a directly exposed CDS view, the Basic Search field is displayed in the SmartFilterBar, even though search is explicitly disabled by using the CDS Annotation: @search.searchable: false.

Analytical List Page (OData V2, UI5 1.71, SAP_BASIS 750)

Expectation: Basic Search should be hidden.
Actual behavior: Basic Search is still displayed.

Important:

  • No @search.* annotations on field level
  • Only @search.searchable: false on view level

Findings
The behavior appears to contradict the expected semantics of the annotation.
In this setup (SAP_BASIS 750 + UI5 1.71 + OData V2), the system behaves as follows:

The mere presence of the annotation @search.searchable (regardless of its value) seems to activate search capabilities in the OData service and UI.

As a result:

The SmartFilterBar interprets the service as search-enabled
The Basic Search field is displayed, even when set to false

Workaround
Remove (or comment out) the annotation completely
@search.searchable: false

Side Effect

After removing the annotation, the CDS view produces a syntax/activation warning or error similar to:
"@Search annotations require 'searchable' for the view"

However:

If the CDS is still activated (ignoring the warning)
The resulting behavior is that the Basic Search field is no longer displayed

entry.title: Unable to set dynamic intervals for Value Axis in Vizframe
entry.content:
I am  trying to plot a Bubble Chart where the Y-axis should display scale intervals of 24 units, such as 0, 24, 48, 72, 96, 120, and 144.

Have configured the minimum value as 0 and the maximum value as 144. However, the chart is automatically generating its own scale intervals instead of following the required 24-unit interval.

Could you please let me know how to configure the Y-axis to use custom scale intervals for plotting?


Thank You.

entry.title: Update and deletion processing of the final receipt flag upon performance cancellation in co03
entry.content:
In SAP ECC, when a production order confirmation is posted for the planned quantity, backflush components are issued with movement type 261, and the final issue indicator is checked. This can be verified in the component overview screen of transaction CO03.

However, after cancelling the full quantity in CO13, although the reversal with movement type 262 is performed, the final issue indicator is not reset.

Could you explain the root cause of this behavior and whether there are any solutions or relevant SAP Notes?

entry.title: SAP BAS Deployment Issue - Request for Support
entry.content:
Hi Team

Requirement

Need to deploy SAP Fiori application from Business Application Studio (BAS) to ABAP system using deployment configuration.

Environment

SAP Business Application Studio (BAS)

Node.js environment

Fiori tools (@sap/fiori)

Target: ABAP

Steps Performed

1. Open BAS terminal

2. Navigate to project directory

3. Run deployment configuration command

CLI Command Used

npm run deploy-config

Observed Behavior

While adding deployment configuration, system throws error during ABAP target selection.

Error Details

Request failed with status code 404

TypeError [ERR_INVALID_ARG_TYPE]: The "code" argument must be of type number. Received type string ('ERR_BAD_REQUEST')

Expected Behavior

Deployment configuration should be added successfully and allow deployment to ABAP system.

Additional Notes

System prompts to install @SAP/generator-fiori globally, however issue persists.

entry.title: SAP Fiori Authorization Concept / Strategy
entry.content: I am currently working on defining and implementing a SAP Fiori Authorization Concept/Strategy, and I would greatly appreciate guidance, best practices, or sample templates from those who have experience in this area.

entry.title: ABAP SAPUI5 1.71.82
entry.content:
Hello

I have applied the note3756746 :  ABAP SAPUI5 1.71.82, to update library SAPUI. Everything was fine, but the version is not updated

/sap/public/bc/ui5_ui5/resources/sap-ui-version.json

"name": "SAPUI5 Distribution", "version": "1.71.81", "buildTimestamp": "202603251409",

The log; Completely implemented

Thanks

Best regards

entry.title: cannot select the data from the list of our previous entries in SAP FIORI
entry.content: we can populate the fields in SAP Fiori if we add them manually, but the problem is that we cannot select the data from the list of our previous entries in SAP Fiori

entry.title: F0366 - My spend new app - Need to change period from Month-to-date to Year-to-date
entry.content:
Hi SAP community! 👋

I'm currently working with the Fiori app F0366 – My Spend (new version) and I'm trying to figure out if it's still possible to switch the period view from Month-to-Date to Year-to-Date.

📌 Maybe I'm wrong, but seems this option was available in the older version of the app, but I can't seem to find it in the new one.

A few questions I'd love to get input on:

  • Has this option been removed or relocated in the new version?
  • Is there a configuration or personalization setting I might be missing?
  • Could this be related to a role/authorization restriction?
  • Any workaround or alternative app that provides a Year-to-Date spend view?

Would appreciate any feedback from those who have worked on this app, whether from a functional, Basis, or Fiori/UI5 perspective. 🙏

S/4 HANA On-premise 2023 SP02

entry.title: Fiori Tools Extension Pack in Cursor
entry.content:
Hi, I'm trying to use the SAP Fiori Tools Extension Pack in Cursor, but it seems that the extension pack (and its dependent extensions) are not available because they are not published in the Open VSX Registry, which Cursor relies on for extensions.

Has anyone found a way to install SAP Fiori Tools in Cursor, either manually or through an alternative extension source?
I'd appreciate hearing about any workarounds, custom installations, or experiences using Cursor for SAP Fiori development.

Thanks in advance!

entry.title: Production Logging Strategy for Client-Side UI5 Application Deployed on SAP BTP
entry.content:
We are building an app using Ui5 freestyle that acts as a side-by-side extension in Sales and Service Cloud Version 2 (SSCv2).

Our goal is to add logging features to the app to assist developers in debugging and troubleshooting issues in the production environment.

Since we are not creating any backend services, we cannot utilize the Cloud logging services in BTP. This app is purely a client-side Ui5 application.

Could you please advise on how to implement logging within our app so that developers can access the logs when the app is deployed on BTP and running in SSCv2 as a mashup

entry.title: Issue dynamically hiding a column in an adaptation project
entry.content:
Hello,

I'm working on an adaptation project for a custom app I've developed in RAP with annotations. My requirement is to hide columns of a table created through annotations according to the value of virtual fields.

Unfortunately as I've seen in other posts that using a boolean virtual element with a LineItem.hidden(#virtelementname) doesn't work, so I've moved to an adaptation project. My approach is to read the virtual fields from the odata4 model through typescript, get the columns from the table through and hide them through setVisible. This is the function that I attach this to the event modelContextChange of the table (the columns are visible for some objects and invisible for others) in the code file generated by the adaptation editor.

	setColumnsVisible = async function (this: ControllerExtension, table: Table ) {
		const bindingContext = this.getView().getBindingContext();
		if (!bindingContext) {
			return;
		}
		const path = `${bindingContext.sPath}`;
		const context : Context = this.getView().getModel().bindContext(path);
		interface VisibilityResponse {Column1Hidden: boolean; };
		const res = await context.requestObject() as VisibilityResponse;
		const columns: Column[] = table.getColumns();
		const columnToHide = columns.find( curr => curr.getPropertyKey().includes("ColumnToHide") );
		columnToHide.setVisible(!res.Column1Hidden);
	};

The result of this is that when Column1Hidden is true the label of the column is hidden but the values are still there. My objective is to hide the whole column including the values.

As a sidenote, just for kicks I tried getting the index of the column, removing it from the table with removeColumn, setting visible to false (on the column) and inserting it back at the right index, it didn't work either. I also tried to call invalidate() on the Table and Column controls after setting the visibility (in case it's evaluated during rendering)  and still no luck.

Does anybody have any ideas how to achieve this?

Thanks,

Ben

entry.title: Werb Service PW-SELF-SERV missing in system
entry.content:
Hello Support Team,

In our system  Webservice (T-Code: SICF) WD_PW_SELF_SERV service is missing.

Please guide to solve the issue.

 

Thank you in advance for your support

Shujah

entry.title: Story report - formula functions - Day of Week
entry.content:
Hi there,

In Canvas report, I have a column with a calculated formula to get the Day of Week from the date, I am trying to replicate the same in Story report, but have no function for that. May someone knows a workaround formula to bring this calculated column?

entry.title: ODATA - FML_UPLMATINVPR_SRV usage
entry.content:
Hi Team ,

We would like to integrate this functionality directly from the SAP backend (ABAP) using the odata service - FML_UPLMATINVPR_SRV without using the Fiori UI. Specifically, our requirement is:

Read an existing Excel file stored within SAP (e.g., MIME repository / application server)
Pass the file content programmatically to the OData service
Trigger the same processing flow (upload → validation → batch → post)
Is it supported to use the OData service FileContentForUploadSet in a backend-driven scenario where:
The Excel file is not uploaded via Fiori UI
Instead, the file content (XSTRING) is read directly from SAP repository
And sent programmatically via HTTP client (CL_HTTP_CLIENT) or similar framework?

Thanks & Regards

Ritushree

entry.title: Saving Variants and Layouts after upgrade
entry.content:
Hi Team,

We are currently in process of upgrading our existing S/4 Hana from 2022 to 2025 Version. As end users have created multiple Variants (Public and Private) and layouts in Fiori, Webdynpro and GUI applications in Launchpad.

Could you please let us know, how we can make sure that variants and layouts are not impacted post Upgrade?

Additionally, if possible , can we save these old variants and layouts in the 2025 Version?
